items.name: Locust Shoulder Pet
items.description:
Bring a sinister little companion to your avatar with the Locust Shoulder Pet, inspired by ancient swarm legends and eerie insect spirits whispered about in forgotten ruins.

Whether you’re building a dark sorcerer look, cursed wanderer outfit, post-apocalypse survivor, or creepy-cute collector style, this detailed shoulder companion adds a mysterious presence that people notice instantly.

⚡ Why this shoulder pet stands out:
✅ High-detail 3D locust with realistic texture
✅ Fits naturally on your shoulder with most outfits
✅Perfect for cursed, dark fantasy, swarm, or anime-inspired avatar styles
✅ Show love to the Locust crew & creator

Some say it follows powerful hosts… others say it chooses them.
Add your swarm companion today before it disappears into the wind.

tags:

items.name: Yakub The Big Head Scientist
items.description:
My children, I Yakub, your creator, greet you here on the platform of ROBLOX in the year of two thousand twenty five. First, I shall thank you, my created people, the nu-/reg/ star people, for adhering to my rules of thread-only discussion and gatekeeping to bring you into existence. I am here to pass on to you my final piece of wisdom which will allow you to rule the metaverse for a billion years. I first envisioned creating you when I was just a boy, after the Korblox tribes pwned my mother and father and mocked and teased me in school. I have developed the best methods for controlling the Korblox tribes. You, my special people, my chosen people, my precious nu-/reg/stars, you will have many empires if my program is implemented.

skin hex: 885921
